All previously passing checks still pass

build.detail: taktician_validate_all confirms build passes. Zero TypeScript errors. Zero lint errors in TeamMemberCPT-specific files (blocks/TeamMemberCPT/*, resources/js/editor/team-member-cpt-panel.tsx).

lint.detail: 2 pre-existing lint errors in FullWidthMedia/FullWidthMedia.tsx (no-base-control-with-label-without-id) and TestimonialsCarousel/TestimonialsCarousel.tsx (no-nested-ternary). 8 pre-existing react-hooks/exhaustive-deps warnings across Accordion, Archive, ContentWithMedia, FullWidthMedia, PostHero, Tabs. None are in TeamMemberCPT. No change from previous QA run.

registration.detail: taktician_validate_all registration check: all sub-checks pass (schema, naming, fileReferences, childBlocks, attributeTypes). block.json unchanged: takt/team-member-cpt, apiVersion:3, inserter:false, multiple:false, attributes:{}. No render field.

imageDropUploaderUsage.detail: ImageDropUploader is correctly imported from '@taktdev/components' at line 7 of TeamMemberCPT.tsx. Used inside the p-4 > overflow-hidden rounded-xl wrapper (matching card-team-member.php structure) with: image={{ id: featuredMediaId || null }}, onSelect writes via editPost({ featured_media: selected.id || 0 }), className='w-full!', imageClassName='w-full! aspect-[395/317]! object-cover!', placeholderClassName='w-full aspect-[395/317]'. The static img tag and manual featuredMediaUrl useSelect have been removed. The onSelect callback does NOT write to meta — it calls editPost directly on the post's featured_media attribute, which is the correct pattern.

featuredMediaEditPost.detail: Confirmed at lines 115-119: onSelect={ (selected) => editPost({ featured_media: selected.id || 0 }) }. This writes directly to the post's featured_media attribute via coreEditorStore.editPost, not to post meta. This is the correct pattern for setting the WordPress featured image (post thumbnail) in the block editor.

featuredImageSupport.detail: FQA-001 from the previous QA run is STILL UNRESOLVED. The 'thumbnail' feature is still absent from inc/post-types/team_member.php line 46: 'supports' => ['title', 'editor', 'excerpt', 'revisions', 'custom-fields']. Confirmed by: (1) reading the file directly — 'thumbnail' not present; (2) REST API GET /wp/v2/team_member/221 with context=edit — 'featured_media' key is absent from the response, which only happens when thumbnail support is missing. Without thumbnail support, getEditedPostAttribute('featured_media') returns null in the editor, so ImageDropUploader will always receive image={{ id: null }} and will show its empty/placeholder state. The onSelect callback writes the correct field, but WordPress will silently reject the featured_media update for post types without thumbnail support. The ImageDropUploader fix is correctly implemented but cannot function until this post type support is added.

previouslyPassingChecks.detail: All checks that passed in the previous QA run continue to pass.

checks.featuredImagePanel: PASS — featured-image.tsx includes 'team_member' in POST_TYPES. Still non-functional until thumbnail support is added (same dependency as FQA-001).

markupStructureIntegrity.detail: The ImageDropUploader replaces only the photo display area. All surrounding markup is unchanged: article wrapper, p-4 > overflow-hidden rounded-xl photo container, flex flex-1 flex-col gap-6 p-6 content area, department badge, name div.text-header-3 with dual RichText spans, role RichText div.text-header-5, mt-auto CTA with TertiaryArrow. Structure still mirrors card-team-member.php exactly.

issues.description: 'thumbnail' is still NOT in the team_member post type supports array. This was reported in the previous QA run and the developer fix did not address it. inc/post-types/team_member.php line 46 still reads: 'supports' => ['title', 'editor', 'excerpt', 'revisions', 'custom-fields']. Without 'thumbnail', WordPress does not expose featured_media in the REST API for this post type, and getEditedPostAttribute('featured_media') always returns null in the editor. The ImageDropUploader is correctly implemented but cannot function (image always shows empty/placeholder state; onSelect writes are silently rejected by WordPress).
issues.impact: Featured image cannot be set or displayed in the block editor for any team member. The card-team-member.php template uses get_post_thumbnail_id() which returns 0/false, so no photo appears on the frontend either.

resolvedIssues.description: Auto-title sync (FQA-002 from previous run) was flagged as a verification gap requiring manual editor testing. The useEffect code is unchanged and correct. No regression introduced. Still requires manual verification in the editor, but no new code issue found.
